raw.official description: Heal from all damage over time dealt by wounds.
raw.ability details:
* Self-healing is not reduced by the global healing reduction passive.
* Adrenaline Rush instantly heals for the remaining wound damage when an enemy dies with wounds on them.
* Healing received from Adrenaline Rush grants ultimate charge.
* Wound damage - and therefore also healing - can be affected by damage amplifications on Junker Queen and reductions on the target.
* Wound is a [[damage over time]] effect, it can be Cleansed and its damage ignores damage reduction from [[armor]].
** Adrenaline Rush healing is tied to the wound effect, resulting in no healing received if the wound is removed.
* Each enemy can have one wound per ability. Reapplying a wound with the same ability refreshes its duration.
** The wounds from return impact and quick melee of Jagged Blade are considered the same ability, but the wound from the direct impact is considered separate.

raw.official description: Commanding Shout fully reloads Scatter Gun and increases allied reload speed by 50%.
Scattergun hits extend your wound durations on those enemies by 0.5 seconds.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
* Can only trigger once per shot per enemy. Multiple pellets from the same shot hitting does not grant more duration increase.

raw.official description: Gain Unstoppable and refreshes all cooldowns by 6 seconds when using Rampage.
raw.ability details: * Unstoppable and a 6 second cooldown deduction are granted immediately upon activation. * Prevents all stun, knockback and sleep effects and [[hinder|hinder/rooted]] from [[File:Downpour.png|sub|link=Hazard#Downpour|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Hazard#Downpour|Downpour]], [[File:Ability-zarya4.png|sub|link=Zarya#Graviton Surge|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Zarya#Graviton Surge|Graviton Surge]], [[File:Abilities-sigma5.png|sub|link=Sigma#Gravitic Flux|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Gravitic Flux|Gravitic Flux]] and [[File:Cage_Fight_icon.png|sub|link=Mauga#Cage Fight|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mauga#Cage Fight|Cage Fight]].

raw.official description: Recalling Jagged Blade from a stuck target refreshes its wound.
raw.ability details:
* ''Removed in Season 18.''
* Also applies to the automatic recall of the blade.

abilities.name: Savage Satiation

raw.ability details: * Unlike [[File:Adrenaline_Rush_Icon.png|sub|link=Junker Queen#Adrenaline Rush|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junker Queen#Adrenaline Rush|Adrenaline Rush]], the initial burst healing is affected by the global healing reduction passive. * Initial burst healing is not given if [[File:Carnage_Icon.png|sub|link=Junker Queen#Carnage|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Junker Queen#Carnage|Carnage]] is deflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]] or [[File:Warding Stance.png|sub|link=Vendetta#Warding Stance|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Vendetta#Warding Stance|Warding Stance]].

raw.official description: Grants temporary health and movement speed to yourself and allies.
raw.ability keywords: area of effect;;spherical::ignore barrier;;target ally::overhealth::speed cap
raw.ability details:
* Cooldown starts when the duration ends.
* Commanding Shout can be activated while casting any other abilities without interrupting them.
* Movement speed bonus counts towards global movement speed buff cap.

abilities.name: Jagged Blade
shot_type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee [[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile

raw.shot type:
[[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
[[File:Abilities-sigma4.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Arcing projectile|Arcing projectile ]] Arcing projectile
raw.official description:
Active: Throw the blade. Re-activate to pull it back with any impaled enemy.
Passive: Wound enemies hit by Quick Melee or Throw, dealing damage over time.
raw.damage:
65 (thrown hit)
30 over 3 seconds (wound, thrown hit)
15 over 3 seconds (wound, return hit & melee)
raw.heal:
75 over 3 seconds (direct hit)
37.5 over 3 seconds (recall/melee)
raw.cast time: 0.13 + 0.24 seconds
raw.ability details: * The cooldown starts when the blade is thrown. * The blade can be recalled anytime after the throw, even while still in mid-air. * The blade is automatically recalled, if has travelled for 1.5 seconds (60m) without hitting an enemy or terrain. * If the blade hits an enemy or terrain, it is automatically recalled 3 seconds after the impact. * The blade is automatically recalled when blocked by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] or [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]]. * The return of Jagged Blade only applies the wound. * Melee attacks while the blade is thrown do not apply a wound. ** No wound is inflicted, if the attack is blocked by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]] or [[File:Warding Stance.png|sub|link=Vendetta#Warding Stance|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Vendetta#Warding Stance|Warding Stance]]. * Jagged Blade drops down if the enemy it was stuck to dies or becomes [[phased out]] (e.g. [[File:Ability-reaper2.png|sub|link=Reaper#Wraith Form|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Reaper#Wraith Form|Wraith Form]]), or if the [[object]] it was stuck to is destroyed or recalled. ** The falling knife may stick to another enemy. * From Season 11 until Mid-Season 12, pull strength against tanks was increased, resulting in only ~25% overall reduction with tank passive taken into account. This change was silently reverted when the global knockback resistance was reduced from 40% to 25%.
